case_title: 720 CLEMENT STREET, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. HARRY LENCZNER et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF 720 CLEMENT STREET, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-23-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 720 CLEMENT STREET, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LENCZNER, HARRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 720 CLEMENT STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94118, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 720 CLEMENT STREET, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LENCZNER, HARRY DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-23-2009 VACATED. CASE SETTLED PER PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S FAXED LETTER DATED 11/19/09. (206)
